cost_components.note: Based on chargeable weight of 210 kg

cost_components.name: Delivery to Door

cost_components.name: Invoice Line Items
cost_components.note: First 3 line-items free, $5.00 per line thereafter

cost_components.name: Bond (if applicable)
cost_components.note: $6.00 per $1,000 of value plus duty, $100.00 minimum

notes: All shipments entering the commerce of the U.S. are subject to U.S. Customs inspection and exams.
Exams occur at the discretion of U.S. Customs and are not negotiable if deemed necessary.
All exam charges will be billed at cost with an additional handling charge of $125.00 per exam.
A Surety Bond is required for all customs entries; rates vary for standard cargo and shipments requiring clearance through other governmental agencies.
